records.title: ADR-IMP-024 title is not evidenced
records.description: ADR-IMP-024 was confirmed accepted and locked but its exact approved title was not available in earlier evidence.
records.impact: Resolved in P0-B06; ADR-IMP-024 is now publishable under its approved title.

records.title: Implementation ADR decision bodies and section decisions remain partially unextracted
records.description: Earlier batches lacked complete approved sources and normalized bodies for the implementation ADR corpus.
records.impact: Resolved at the ADR-body level in P0-B08; all 29 accepted implementation ADRs now have complete normalized bodies. Non-ADR section decomposition remains part of broader P0 extraction under the applicable source-family gaps.

records.title: G0, G1, and complete viability source bodies remain uncontrolled
records.description: G0 and G1 have controlled public-safe record-level summaries. The viability review now has a controlled executive disposition, findings, transition conditions, approval evidence, and historical numbering reconciliation, but the complete exact source bodies remain uncontrolled.
records.impact: Foundations and Blueprint drafting have disposition-level viability traceability, but PG0 cannot pass while complete foundational and viability source bodies remain incomplete.

records.title: Complete verbatim AIOP section bodies remain uncontrolled
records.description: AIOP Sections 1–7, their approval chain, the final AIOP v1.0 approval, the locked operating posture, and the exact 22-item DIP AI Constitution list are controlled. Complete verbatim AIOP section bodies, all subsection text, and any extended constitutional commentary remain unavailable.
records.impact: AI principles, invariants, requirements, terminology, and core conformance mappings can now be normalized, but PG0 cannot pass until the complete approved AIOP source package is controlled.

records.title: Publication gate criteria require exact extraction
records.description: Resolved: the complete approved P0–P6 planning responses, approval chains, and exact PG0–PG6 gate criteria are controlled.
records.impact: PG0–PG6 are formally evaluable, but none passes merely because its planning model was approved.

records.title: Source revision and release pinning are not established
records.description: Repository roles, locator forms, and release-pin conventions are approved. A controlled working corpus exists, while the final authoritative public source revision and Architecture v1.0 publication tag and commit remain pending.
records.impact: Current file integrity can be verified, but generated editions and archives cannot claim source-revision or release-level reproducibility.

records.title: Implementation non-ADR record decomposition remains incomplete
records.description: All 29 implementation ADR bodies and all 464 approved non-ADR locked decisions from Implementation Planning Sections 1 through 12 are normalized with controlled source and approval evidence.
records.impact: Resolved: the implementation-planning decision corpus is record-complete. Other source-family and publication-control gaps remain separate blockers for PG0 and PG3.

records.title: Structured register public projection remains incomplete
records.description: P0-B27 rejected unsafe direct structured-register publication. P0-B28 defines closed per-register public schemas. P0-B29 generates and reviews all twelve quarantined candidate projections successfully; explicit installation approval, public-build integration, immutable public revision binding, and repository readback remain pending.
records.impact: The public repository has a safe abstract ADR working corpus, but the public editions cannot yet include machine-readable decision, requirement, principle, invariant, terminology, source, gap, gate, spike, scope, and traceability registers with verified disclosure boundaries.
